sections.paragraph: more rarely עֹול, with suff. עֻלֹּו m. a yoke, a curved piece of wood fastened to the pole. or beam, laid upon the neck of beasts for drawing, Num 19:2 Deu 21:3. Mostly used figuratively of servitude, 1Sa 6:7 1Ki 12:11 Isa 9:3 of calamity, Lam 3:27. Arab. غُلُّ id., from the root עָלַל, غَلَّ No. II, 2.
